concerns.location: spec.md:User Story 2 - Centrality Metric Computation and Group Comparison
concerns.text: The specification expands the research focus from the original mediation question (structural centrality of DMN hubs mediating functional connectivity strength and ADOS‑2 social‑communication scores) to a broad functional‑only centrality group‑comparison and classification pipeline, thereby silently redefining the research question.

concerns.location: spec.md:User Story 3 - Diagnostic Classification and Visualization
concerns.text: The spec adds a diagnostic classification task (logistic regression) and brain‑surface visualizations, which were not part of the original idea and constitute unnecessary over‑reach beyond the stated scientific aim.
